title: Manually verify Navidrome playlist sync end-to-end
description: The playlists feature was rewritten to be server-backed: create/rename/delete/add-songs/remove-song/reorder all go through the Subsonic API via SubsonicClient + usePlaylistStore, instead of AsyncStorage. Unit tests pass against a mocked client, but the actual wire behavior against a real Navidrome server hasn't been exercised yet.
acceptance_criteria: Open Playlists screen against a real Navidrome server and confirm: server-side playlists (e.g. 'Discover') appear with correct song counts; creating/deleting a playlist from Manatunes is reflected in the Navidrome web UI; removing a song and reordering via drag persist correctly (verifies the createPlaylist-with-playlistId full-replace approach used for reordering); adding a song from an album/artist/song long-press menu updates the song count.
